name: Curried Cauliflower & Potatoes (Aloo Gobi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the minced chilies, ginger, cumin seeds, and black mustard seeds in a small bowl.
2. Heat the ghee in a large pot over medium heat until hot.
3. Add the spices to the hot ghee and stir until the mustard seeds begin to pop.
4. Add the potatoes and cauliflower florets. Fry for 4 minutes or so.
5. Add the diced tomatoes, turmeric, coriander, garam masala, brown sugar, salt, and half of the chopped coriander.
6. Mix well, cover, and gently heat on low for 15 minutes. If the vegetables start to stick, add a few drops of water.
7. Top with the remaining chopped coriander before serving.
